## [21:19 - 24:21]

So it depends on what marketplace you're in. Now with that being said, I don't like to test stuff on weekends. If I'm going to be completely fair with a funnel, I would rather launch it Monday through maybe Thursday, okay? Monday through Thursday because Wednesday traffic behaves differently than weekdays traffic or weekday traffic. So what I tell my media buyers or what I tell media buyers of the agency or whenever we launch a campaign and we happen to launch it on a Friday, right? What I tell them is, okay, so leave it running through the weekend but also wait until Tuesday. So you have two days, two weekend days and then two weekday days, okay? So you have Saturday, Sunday and then Monday, Tuesday and then Tuesday, Tuesday night or Wednesday morning you make a call because the traffic on the weekends behave differently the traffic on weekdays. Now this is for the funnels, direct response funnels, entrepreneurship, you know, whatever it is, local business funnel, so those type of funnels. On e-commerce though, when you're running an e-commerce campaign, weekends behave like way better. Like weekends is your time to make money, all right? So weekends you need to leverage weekends versus weekdays because weekdays might be like little lower on traffic. Especially Mondays and Tuesday, sometimes Wednesdays. So Thursday, Friday, Saturday, Sunday are your peak days. So if you want to test anything, test it that day. You know what I'm saying?
